THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIOLUPO, LAINA AIOLUPO, IEREMIA MANU, EMILY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 429 ROSE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO. $5,117.00 RENT, $595.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,087.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2003 Continued To Dec-22-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Aquilina.
Linda Reyes, Esq., for Plaintiff: Hayes Valley Limited Partnership.
No appearance by the Defendants: Laina Aiolupo, Ieremia Aiolupo and Emily Manu.
09:20 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Hasinah Rahim the authorized agent was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Notice to pay or quit --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at: 429 Rose St., San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of 5,117.00
Attorney's fees $595.00
Costs of $375.00
For the total of $6,087.00
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Court Clerk, Marjorie Schwartz-Scott & Marta Vallejo, No Reporter or Bailiff.

Appearence: Linda Reyes, Esq. for Plaintiff, Hayes Valley Ltd.
No appearance by defendant.

Jury demand stricken. Court trial scheduled for Monday, December 22, 2033 in Dept #206 at 9am.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2003 Off Calendar
